name: ionos-sync
title: IONOS Sync
description: Sync local projects to IONOS web hosting via rsync over SSH — with dry-run preview, push/pull, and project management.
author: wdeu

commands.name: sync-project
commands.title: Sync Project
commands.subtitle: IONOS Sync
commands.description: Select a project and push or pull files via rsync over SSH

commands.name: manage-projects
commands.title: Manage Projects
commands.subtitle: IONOS Sync
commands.description: Add, edit or remove sync projects

preferences.name: ionosHost
preferences.title: IONOS Host
preferences.description: SSH hostname from your IONOS control panel (e.g. ssh.hosting.ionos.de)

preferences.name: sshKeyPath
preferences.title: SSH Key Path (optional)
preferences.description: Path to your SSH private key. Leave empty to use the default key (~/.ssh/id_rsa).

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
